sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113649" key="xeiro/mantis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χειρό-μαντις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n113649.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">diviner by palmistry, fortune-teller,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:152" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.152</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
